title: Cloudflare Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Cloudflare announced fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 financial results. Fiscal year 2024 revenue totaled $1,669.6 million, representing an increase of 29% year-over-year, with fourth quarter revenue totaling $459.9 million, representing an increase of 27% year-over-year. Customers spending more than $1 million grew to 173, representing a 47% increase year-over-year. The company serves 237,700 paying customers, representing a record addition of nearly 48,000 paying customers in 2024 and an increase of 25% year over year. Free cash flow improved significantly, with the company achieving strong profitability metrics. For full-year 2025, the company expected total revenue of $2,090.0 to $2,094.0 million, non-GAAP income from operations of $272.0 to $276.0 million, and non-GAAP net income per share of $0.79 to $0.80. Q4 2024 operating income reached $62.9 million and Q4 2024 free cash flow was $47.8 million. The company highlighted strong enterprise momentum and continued adoption of its security and performance services among large customers.
